search_queries: 2026 CMS IRMAA brackets part B premium
2026 Medicare part B premium IRMAA CMS
contract_notes: For IRMAA bracket data, interpret tiers with this contract convention: the first bracket covers income less than or equal to magi_max, interior brackets cover income greater than magi_min and less than or equal to magi_max, and the final bracket covers income greater than magi_min with magi_max = null.
Do not treat published interval notation such as <=, >, <, or >= as a schema mismatch if the numeric thresholds map cleanly to the convention above.
If SSA POMS pages are used to support filing-status mappings, each actual SSA URL relied on must have its own source record and locator.
